attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT EUOOLH.BATCH_ID,
       EUOOLH.GES_PK_ID,
       EUOOLH.CANCELLED_FLAG,
       EUOOLH.CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
       EUOOLH.HEADER_ID,
       EUOOLH.HIST_CREATED_BY,
       EUOOLH.HIST_CREATION_DATE,
       EUOOLH.HIST_TYPE_CODE,
       EUOOLH.REQUEST_ID,
       EUOOLH.LATEST_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
       EUOOLH.LINE_ID,
       EUOOLH.LINE_NUMBER,
       EUOOLH.REASON_CODE,
       EUOOLH.CDB_DATA_SOURCE,
       EUOOLH.CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
       EUOOLH.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
       EUOOLH.CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ,
       EUOOLH.QUEUE_ID,
       EUOOLH.PROCESS_SET_ID,
       EUOOLH.Q_CREATION_DATE,
       EUOOLH.Q_UPDATE_DATE,
       EUOOLH.ACTION_CODE,
       EUOOLH.CREATE_DATETIME
  FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY EUOOLH WHERE EUOOLH.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_UO_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY SUOOLH WHERE SUOOLH.LINE_ID = EUOOLH.LINE_ID)

SELECT 
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 				SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SBOLH.LINE_NUMBER 				BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER,
SBOLH.LINE_ID 				LINE_ID,
SBOLH.REASON_CODE  						SOL_CANCEL_REASON_CODE,
COALESCE(HIST_CREATED_BY,-999) 			SOL_CANCELLED_BY_INT,
HIST_CREATION_DATE 						SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME,
COALESCE(LATEST_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,0) 	SOL_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
-9999 SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-999 SHIP_SET_NUMBER_INT,
NULL									SOL_ORDER_QUANTITY,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 				SS_CODE ,
USER 									EDW_CREATE_USER,
USER 									EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					EDW_OBSERVATION_DATETIME,
SBOLH.ACTION_CODE						ACTION_CODE,
'=' 									DML_TYPE  
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY SBOLH
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SBOLH.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO') 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SBOLH.LINE_ID,SBOLH.REASON_CODE,HIST_CREATION_DATE  
ORDER BY SBOLH.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME DESC ) = 1

SELECT 
      BATCH_ID 	,
      GES_PK_ID 	,
      CANCELLED_FLAG 	,
      CANCELLED_QUANTITY 	,
      HEADER_ID 	,
      HIST_CREATED_BY	,
      HIST_CREATION_DATE 	,
      HIST_TYPE_CODE 	,
      REQUEST_ID	,
      LATEST_CANCELLED_QUANTITY 	,
      LINE_ID 	,
      LINE_NUMBER 	,
      REASON_CODE	,
      CDB_DATA_SOURCE 	,
      CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME 	,
      CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME 	,
      CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ 	,
      QUEUE_ID 	,
      PROCESS_SET_ID 	,
      Q_CREATION_DATE 	,
      Q_UPDATE_DATE 	,
      ACTION_CODE	,
      CREATE_DATETIME,
 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY SUOLH
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUOLH.LINE_ID,SUOLH.REASON_CODE,HIST_CREATION_DATE  
ORDER BY SUOLH.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME DESC ) = 1
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
                INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			WHERE SUOLH.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )

SELECT EBOOLH.BATCH_ID,
       EBOOLH.GES_PK_ID,
       EBOOLH.CANCELLED_FLAG,
       EBOOLH.CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
       EBOOLH.HEADER_ID,
       EBOOLH.HIST_CREATED_BY,
       EBOOLH.HIST_CREATION_DATE,
       EBOOLH.HIST_TYPE_CODE,
       EBOOLH.REQUEST_ID,
       EBOOLH.LATEST_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
       EBOOLH.LINE_ID,
       EBOOLH.LINE_NUMBER,
       EBOOLH.REASON_CODE,
       EBOOLH.CDB_DATA_SOURCE,
       EBOOLH.CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
       EBOOLH.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
       EBOOLH.CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ,
       EBOOLH.QUEUE_ID,
       EBOOLH.PROCESS_SET_ID,
       EBOOLH.Q_CREATION_DATE,
       EBOOLH.Q_UPDATE_DATE,
       EBOOLH.ACTION_CODE,
       EBOOLH.CREATE_DATETIME
  FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_BO_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY EBOOLH WHERE EBOOLH.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY SBOOLH WHERE SBOOLH.LINE_ID = EBOOLH.LINE_ID)

SELECT 
ECOOLH.LINE_ID,
ECOOLH.SHIP_SET_ID,
ECOOLH.REASON_CODE,
ECOOLH.LINE_NUMBER,
ECOOLH.HIST_CREATION_DATE,
ECOOLH.HIST_CREATED_BY,
ECOOLH.LATEST_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
ECOOLH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
ECOOLH.GLOBAL_NAME,
ECOOLH.CANCELLED_FLAG,
ECOOLH.CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
ECOOLH.CREATED_BY,
ECOOLH.CREATION_DATE,
ECOOLH.HEADER_ID,
ECOOLH.HIST_COMMENTS,
ECOOLH.HIST_TYPE_CODE,
ECOOLH.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ECOOLH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
ECOOLH.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE,
ECOOLH.LINE_SET_ID,
ECOOLH.LINE_TYPE_ID,
ECOOLH.LINK_TO_LINE_ID,
ECOOLH.ORDERED_QUANTITY,
ECOOLH.REQUEST_DATE,
ECOOLH.REQUEST_ID,
ECOOLH.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
ECOOLH.SALESREP_ID,
ECOOLH.SHIPMENT_NUMBER,
ECOOLH.ORG_ID 
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_OE_ORD_LINES_HIST ECOOLH WHERE ECOOLH.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORD_LINES_HIST SCOOLH WHERE SCOOLH.LINE_ID = ECOOLH.LINE_ID)

SELECT 
SCOOLH.LINE_ID,
SCOOLH.SHIP_SET_ID,
SCOOLH.REASON_CODE,
SCOOLH.LINE_NUMBER,
SCOOLH.HIST_CREATION_DATE,
SCOOLH.HIST_CREATED_BY,
SCOOLH.LATEST_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
SCOOLH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
SCOOLH.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCOOLH.CANCELLED_FLAG,
SCOOLH.CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
SCOOLH.CREATED_BY,
SCOOLH.CREATION_DATE,
SCOOLH.HEADER_ID,
SCOOLH.HIST_COMMENTS,
SCOOLH.HIST_TYPE_CODE,
SCOOLH.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SCOOLH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SCOOLH.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE,
SCOOLH.LINE_SET_ID,
SCOOLH.LINE_TYPE_ID,
SCOOLH.LINK_TO_LINE_ID,
SCOOLH.ORDERED_QUANTITY,
SCOOLH.REQUEST_DATE,
SCOOLH.REQUEST_ID,
SCOOLH.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
SCOOLH.SALESREP_ID,
SCOOLH.SHIPMENT_NUMBER, 
SCOOLH.ORG_ID,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORD_LINES_HIST SCOOLH
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SCOOLH.LINE_ID,SCOOLH.REASON_CODE,SCOOLH.HIST_CREATION_DATE  
ORDER BY SCOOLH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC ) = 1
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
               INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
WHERE SCOOLH.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )

SELECT 
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SCOOLH.LINE_NUMBER LINE_NUMBER,
SCOOLH.LINE_ID LINE_ID,
SCOOLH.REASON_CODE   SOL_CANCEL_REASON_CODE,
COALESCE(SCOOLH.HIST_CREATED_BY,-999) SOL_CANCELLED_BY_INT,
SCOOLH.HIST_CREATION_DATE SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME,
COALESCE(SCOOLH.LATEST_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,0) SOL_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
-9999  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-999  SHIP_SET_NUMBER_INT,
NULL SOL_ORDER_QUANTITY,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE ,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_OBSERVATION_DATETIME,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'=' DML_TYPE,
 SCOOLH.SHIP_SET_ID SHIP_SET_ID,
  SCOOLH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
   SCOOLH.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME,
   SCOOLH.HIST_TYPE_CODE HIST_TYPE_CODE,
SCOOLH.ORG_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORD_LINES_HIST SCOOLH
INNER JOIN (
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
)
ON ( SCOOLH.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG') 

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SCOOLH.LINE_ID,SCOOLH.REASON_CODE,SCOOLH.HIST_CREATION_DATE  
ORDER BY SCOOLH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC ) = 1

SELECT 
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 				SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SUOLH.LINE_NUMBER 				LINE_NUMBER,
SUOLH.LINE_ID 				LINE_ID,
SUOLH.REASON_CODE  						SOL_CANCEL_REASON_CODE,
COALESCE(HIST_CREATED_BY,-999) 			SOL_CANCELLED_BY_INT,
HIST_CREATION_DATE 						SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME,
COALESCE(LATEST_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,0) 	SOL_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
-9999  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-999  SHIP_SET_NUMBER_INT,
NULL									SOL_ORDER_QUANTITY,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 				SS_CODE ,
USER 									EDW_CREATE_USER,
USER 									EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					EDW_OBSERVATION_DATETIME,
SUOLH.ACTION_CODE						ACTION_CODE,
'=' 									DML_TYPE  
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_UO_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY SUOLH
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SUOLH.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO') 
        
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUOLH.LINE_ID,SUOLH.REASON_CODE,HIST_CREATION_DATE  
ORDER BY SUOLH.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME DESC ) = 1

SELECT 
      BATCH_ID 	,
      GES_PK_ID 	,
      CANCELLED_FLAG 	,
      CANCELLED_QUANTITY 	,
      HEADER_ID 	,
      HIST_CREATED_BY	,
      HIST_CREATION_DATE 	,
      HIST_TYPE_CODE 	,
      REQUEST_ID	,
      LATEST_CANCELLED_QUANTITY 	,
      LINE_ID 	,
      LINE_NUMBER 	,
      REASON_CODE	,
      CDB_DATA_SOURCE 	,
      CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME 	,
      CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME 	,
      CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ 	,
      QUEUE_ID 	,
      PROCESS_SET_ID 	,
      Q_CREATION_DATE 	,
      Q_UPDATE_DATE 	,
      ACTION_CODE	,
      CREATE_DATETIME,
 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_UO_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY SUOLH
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUOLH.LINE_ID,SUOLH.REASON_CODE,HIST_CREATION_DATE  
ORDER BY SUOLH.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME DESC ) = 1
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
                INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			WHERE SUOLH.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
